columns.name: AuthAnswer
columns.description: Indicates if the DNS response is authoritative.

columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalEmail
columns.description: Email address of the user or service account performing the action.

columns.name: AuthenticationInfoPrincipalSubject
columns.description: The subject identifier for the principal (user or service account).

columns.name: AuthorizationInfo
columns.description: Details about the authorization decision for the request.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: DestinationIP
columns.description: Target IP address of the request.

columns.name: GCPResourceName
columns.description: Name of the resource being accessed or modified.

columns.name: GCPResourceType
columns.description: Type of the resource (e.g., compute instance, DNS record).

columns.name: InsertId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each log entry.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LogName
columns.description: The name of the log where this entry is stored.

columns.name: MethodName
columns.description: The API method or operation invoked in the request.

columns.name: PayloadType
columns.description: The format or type of the payload in the log entry.

columns.name: Protocol
columns.description: Protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP).

columns.name: QueryName
columns.description: The domain name queried.

columns.name: QueryType
columns.description: DNS query type (RFC 1035 section 4.1.2).

columns.name: Rdata
columns.description: DNS answer in presentation format.

columns.name: ReqManZoneCloudLogConfigEnableLogging
columns.description: Indicates whether logging was enabled in the request for the managed zone.

columns.name: ReqManZonePrivVisibConfigNetworks
columns.description: List of networks configured for private visibility of the managed zone.

columns.name: ReqmetaCallerSuppliedUserAgent
columns.description: User agent String provided by the caller.

columns.name: ReqmetaRequestAttributesTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the request was initiated.

columns.name: RequestAPIType
columns.description: The type of API request being logged.

columns.name: RequestChangeAdditions
columns.description: Details of resource additions in the request.

columns.name: RequestChangeDeletions
columns.description: Details of resource deletions in the request.

columns.name: RequestManagedZone
columns.description: Details of the managed DNS zone in the request.

columns.name: RequestManagedZoneDescription
columns.description: Description of the managed DNS zone in the request.

columns.name: RequestManagedZoneDnsName
columns.description: The DNS name of the managed zone in the request.

columns.name: RequestManagedZoneName
columns.description: The name of the managed DNS zone in the request.

columns.name: RequestManagedZoneVisibility
columns.description: The visibility (public or private) of the managed zone in the request.

columns.name: RequestMetadataCallerIp
columns.description: IP address of the caller initiating the request.

columns.name: RequestName
columns.description: Name of the resource affected by the request.

columns.name: RequestProject
columns.description: Google Cloud project associated with the request.

columns.name: RequestType
columns.description: Type of the request (e.g., Create, Delete, Update).

columns.name: ResManZoneCloudLogConfigEnableLogging
columns.description: Indicates whether logging was enabled in the response for the managed zone.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsLocation
columns.description: Location of the resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsPolicyName
columns.description: Represents the policy name associated with the DNS resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID associated with the resource.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsSourceType
columns.description: Specifies the source type of the resource being modified

columns.name: ResourceLabelsTargetName
columns.description: The target resource name within Google Cloud DNS, such as the managed zone or DNS policy being modified.

columns.name: ResourceLabelsTargetType
columns.description: The type of DNS resource being acted upon

columns.name: ResourceLabelsZoneName
columns.description: The name of the managed DNS zone related to the operation.

columns.name: RespManZonePrivVisibConfigNetworks
columns.description: Lists networks associated with a private managed zone under private visibility configuration.

columns.name: ResponseChangeAdditions
columns.description: Represents additions made to DNS records (e.g., new A, AAAA, CNAME, or TXT records).

columns.name: ResponseChangeDeletions
columns.description: Details of deletions in the response.

columns.name: ResponseChangeId
columns.description: Identifier for the change request in the response.

columns.name: ResponseChangeStartTime
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the change operation started.

columns.name: ResponseChangeStatus
columns.description: Status of the change operation in the response.

columns.name: ResponseCode
columns.description: Response code for the operation.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneCreationTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the managed zone was created.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneDescription
columns.description: Description of the managed zone returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneDnsName
columns.description: DNS name of the managed zone returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneFingerprint
columns.description: Fingerprint for detecting changes in the managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneName
columns.description: Name of the managed zone returned in the response.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneNameServers
columns.description: List of name servers associated with the managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneRrsetCount
columns.description: The total number of resource record sets (RRsets) within a managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseManagedZoneVisibility
columns.description: Visibility setting (public/private) of the managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseOperationId
columns.description: A unique identifier for the DNS operation performed.

columns.name: ResponseOperationStartTime
columns.description: The timestamp when the DNS operation started.

columns.name: ResponseOperationStatus
columns.description: The status of the DNS operation

columns.name: ResponseOperationType
columns.description: The type of DNS operation executed (e.g., create, update, delete).

columns.name: ResponseOperationUser
columns.description: The user or service account that performed the DNS operation.

columns.name: ResponseOpZoneContextNewValue
columns.description: The new value after an operation modifies a DNS managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseOpZoneContextOldValue
columns.description: The previous value before an operation modified the DNS managed zone.

columns.name: ResponseType
columns.description: Type of response returned from the API.

columns.name: ServerLatency
columns.description: Measures the latency of the request to Google Cloud DNS.

columns.name: ServiceName
columns.description: Name of the Google Cloud service processing the request.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Log severity level (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR).

columns.name: SourceIP
columns.description: IP address from which the query originated.

columns.name: SourceNetwork
columns.description: The originating network of the DNS request.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: StatusCode
columns.description: HTTP status code returned for the request.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp when the log entry was created.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the log entry was recorded.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: VmInstanceId
columns.description: Compute Engine VM instance ID.

columns.name: VmInstanceIdString
columns.description: The VM instance ID (if applicable) associated with the request.

columns.name: VmInstanceName
columns.description: Compute Engine VM instance name.

columns.name: VmProjectId
columns.description: Google Cloud project ID of the network from which the query was sent.

columns.name: VmZoneName
columns.description: Name of the VM zone from which the query originated.
